name: study-terminal
description: Gamified study terminal with flashcards and spaced repetition

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/app.mjs --format=esm --external:blessed --external:term.js --external:pty.js --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\" --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
